description.zh: 你准备的如何了？我有一个伙计精通狙击步枪的射击技巧，也许你会对他有兴趣。他曾是PMC的一员，但现在他已经退休了，如今付钱就可以接受他的训练。如果你下定决心，我想我可以为你们安排一次会面。
description.en: How's life treating you, mercenary? Maybe you will be interested, a friend of mine is exceptionally skilled at shooting sniper rifles. He worked as a PMC, but now he has retired and is mentoring people for cash. But I'm afraid that his services are not cheap. If you decide, I think I could arrange a meeting for you.
